# Audio Playback

> 2D and 3D audio stream playback

**Category:** Integration · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** integration · godot

## What this does

2D and 3D audio stream playback

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **2d Audio** — when Global audio playback is requested, then Global audio playback completed.
- **3d Audio** — when Spatialized audio with Doppler is requested, then Spatialized audio with Doppler completed.
- **Volume Control** — when Set gain and loudness is requested, then Set gain and loudness completed.
- **Pitch Control** — when Adjust playback speed is requested, then Adjust playback speed completed.
- **Looping** — when Repeat audio indefinitely is requested, then Repeat audio indefinitely completed.
